content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across br_health.rs, br_process.rs, success_reconciliation.rs, milestone_record/service.rs, project.rs, run.rs, cli.rs, and .gitignore. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings. The implementation is well-structured: sync_import support with dirty-flag guards, crash-safe pending-mutation marker persisted to disk and recovered on restart, line-based conflict marker detection that avoids false positives from markers embedded in JSON values, pre-mutation health checks at claim_bead_in_br and reconcile_success, and thorough test coverage including gitignore verification, restart recovery, and cleanup-failure edge cases. The .gitignore correctly excludes the transient marker file. No bugs, safety problems, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
